creator: meta@vmeta.jp
text:
It seems that Japanese send-pr page loses attached patch.
I submitted ports/184055 from the page, the patch disappeared.

https://www.freebsd.org/ja/send-pr.html

How-To-Repeat: 1. Submit a PR with a patch from Japanese send-pr page [1].
2. Browse the PR
3. The patch is missing

[1] https://www.freebsd.org/ja/send-pr.html
